meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop chasing clients without a portfolio. Learn to build passive income assets using Antigravity and Claude Code to showcase your skills and earn revenue.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by building micro-SaaS tools that generate passive income. By leveraging AI-assisted development, you transform your lack of client history into a library of functional, revenue-generating products that demonstrate your technical proficiency and entrepreneurial mindset to potential high-paying clients instantly.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a new freelancer is a graveyard of ambition. You have the skills, but the lack of a portfolio creates a friction-filled wall between you and your first $5k client. Clients don't care about your resume; they care about your ability to ship. 

We are shifting the paradigm. Instead of begging for work, you will build automated, passive income-generating tools. This isn't just a portfolio; it is proof of competency. Using Antigravity and Claude Code, you can turn a weekend of effort into a living asset that proves your value while you sleep.

steps.title: Define the Micro-Utility
steps.description: Identify a small, repetitive problem in a niche market. Focus on a tool that solves one specific task, like a specialized calculator or a data formatter.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior product architect. Suggest 5 low-code SaaS ideas that solve high-friction problems for digital marketers and require less than 48 hours to build.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a project spec for a niche SEO keyword clustering tool with a clean UI.'

steps.title: Scaffold with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate. This ensures your project structure is industry-standard and ready for deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust Next.js project structure with Tailwind CSS, Supabase integration, and Stripe checkout flow enabled.

steps.title: Build the Core Logic
steps.description: Implement the primary utility function. Focus on performance and clean, maintainable code that you can show off on GitHub.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a highly optimized TypeScript function for the core utility that handles user input validation and error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement the core business logic in src/lib/processor.ts'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization
steps.description: Add a Stripe integration to handle payments. This proves to clients that you understand the end-to-end SaaS lifecycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe checkout session handler and a webhook listener to process successful payments.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm install stripe && claude add-stripe-integration'

steps.title: Deploy and Showcase
steps.description: Push your code to Vercel and include a 'Technical Deep Dive' README to impress prospective clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md that highlights the technical architecture, design choices, and scalability of this micro-SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'git push origin main && vercel --prod'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Behind the Code' section in your README to explain your architectural decisions to hiring managers.
Use a custom domain for every tool; it makes your portfolio look like a collection of startups rather than student projects.
Implement automated error tracking (like Sentry) even in small projects to demonstrate your commitment to production-grade reliability.
Build a 'public roadmap' on your landing page to show clients you understand product management, not just coding.
Record a 60-second Loom video demo of your tool and link it in your GitHub repo; it increases trust by 300%.
content.next_steps: Once your tool is live, add it to your LinkedIn featured section and reach out to 5 potential clients in the niche you targeted, offering them a free trial of your utility.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a professional. Build your own assets, prove your worth through code, and command higher rates by showing, not telling. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
